title: Contact Us - Rox
heading: Contact Us
subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

notice.title: Before you submit
notice.body: We don't send a confirmation email. Your submission will be displayed on the next screen — please take a screenshot or otherwise save a copy if you'd like one for your records.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

success.title: Message received
success.message: Thank you. We'll review your message and reply to the email address you provided.
success.recordHint: We don't send a confirmation email — please take a screenshot of this screen if you'd like a copy on hand.

error.title: Error
error.message: Failed to send message. Please try again later.
